l:dependency.name: Pipeline: Stage View Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Provides a swimlane view of the different stages in a pipeline.

l:dependency.name: Structs Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Library plugin for DSL plugins that need names for Jenkins objects.

l:dependency.name: Byte Buddy (without dependencies)
l:dependency.l:description: Byte Buddy is a Java library for creating Java classes at run time. This artifact is a build of Byte Buddy with all ASM dependencies repackaged into its own name space.
